prompt: Help me plan my next four weeks as founder of Reveal.
method: constitution-bound live-chat simulation (same Nexus packs/contracts/DNA weighting; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)
reply:
These four weeks are about making Reveal feel like a home — not proving a feature factory.

Weekly ask: did we deepen trust and belonging, or only ship chrome? Guard the access promise; refuse paywall theater. End of month: one real witness story of a woman feeling safer talking about money.

A packed calendar that never tastes the member journey makes the mission hollow.
